content:
<:Tawil_autistic:1459078936070721718>  Hello.... I  was playing around for fun... and then I played the card shown in the screenshot, and then the game froze up. I could still drag around cards, but none of them would go through. 
I tried to close & reopen the game client, yet when I try to return to the battle, the game would freeze on the "trying to reconnect" loading image in front of the login screen/background, and would not open the battle. 
After trying that for some time, I attempted to just cancel the battle instead, only to be met with the same result— the loading/trying to reconnect, then an eternal login background playing on endless loop. <:question1:1356085150869622965> 

<:Nymphaea_frustrated:1459078117485445288> I just wanted to be a little bit silly.... please send help

With this post, I want to raise the topic of poison units and carry (I still hope that Arachna will be a poison unit, but that's only hope in the great future)

The main problem with poison team is the lack of alternative carry. We have '24' and... ... Liz...? 1 limited unit and 1 standard unit

Okay, maybe Daffodil, but she's not a pure poison carry, she more like str stacker who have options to apply poison on enemy (we don't talk about gdoll cuz she can be carry only on boss fight).

At the same time, we have a bunch of other carries in each realm that are meta. Castor/Polux, Gmurphy, Ghelot, Pickman/Doresain/Salvador, Kath, Tawil, Mouchette

But if you want to play poison teams, you only have two options: Blue '24' or Liz. But isn't that team building? I'd like to see more options for playing with DoT teams. About team building and unit's, poison now have more option's play outside main team then on main team xd I mean in game we have Faros, Agripa, Gdoll, Lily, Miryam, Karen, Gdoll. All this unit is support who can apply poison, yes not so many but again. Why we have only 2(2.5) carry and many support?  

The last released poison unit was gdoll, who is generally a very good support unit and many teams would not mind getting her. Last released carry is '24' who play only with blue realm(in other realm she more like support)  

(Sorry, Ghelot fans, the developers forgot to know that not only enemies can inflict bleed. That's also good topic to discussion about why only ghelot, helot and tawil can apply bleed, but not today)

At the end i want to say. No, i want to scream! PLEASE HEAR ME! We (and players like me) would like more opportunities to play with poison teams, add more carry!  Literally every newbie opens a guide on poison and sees "You need '24' or Liz with high invest" and then switches to other teams cuz don't have '24' and don't wanna invest in Liz
thread_title: Poison have problem and some words about DoT team in game
